'''Dareb''' an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and partner of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Orvak]]. He was killed by crashing his [[TIE stealth]] into a tree and went spinning directly to the invisible shield that the [[Jedi Praxeum]]'s [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] was making.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
